title: Vibrant Zesty Arabic Rhubarb Bowl
description: A peppery, aerated rhubarb bowl packed with Middle Eastern flavors, perfect for a plant‑based bento lunch.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200, roast 80g chickpeas on a sheet for 10 minutes, then let them cool to room temperature.
Slice the forced rhubarb into thin strips and place them in a bowl.
Add diced cucumber, halved cherry tomatoes, and chopped mint to the bowl with rhubarb.
Whisk tahini, date syrup, lemon zest, sumac, lemon juice, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Pour the tahini dressing over the vegetable mixture and toss gently to combine.
Divide the mixture into two compartments of a bento box, placing the chickpeas in the bottom layer.
Top the chickpeas with the rhubarb and vegetable mixture, pressing lightly to keep it aerated.
Garnish the bowl with a sprinkle of sumac and a few mint leaves for extra aroma.
Serve immediately or refrigerate for up to 2 hours before serving.
